title: Advanced World Event
heading: Advanced fields enter review
introParagraphs: A review fixture exposes every advanced world-event field without adding a new draft schema.

options.label: Make a public response.
options.subtitle: Requires capacity and changes the public frame.
narrativeParagraphs: The party spends capacity to define the event in public.

variants.text: Existing media relationships make the response travel farther.

options.label: Keep the review quiet.
narrativeParagraphs: The organization preserves capacity and accepts a quieter public trace.
